acceptanceReviewed.criterion: scripts/qd-reports-check.sh uses a reusable jq predicate for required non-blank report text fields.
acceptanceReviewed.evidence: The script defines a shared nonblank predicate and expect_jq prepends it to report validation expressions.

acceptanceReviewed.criterion: Completion report checks reject blank nodeId, summary, changedFiles[], nested acceptance evidence strings, nested command strings, evidence[], and realWorldValidation.evidence.
acceptanceReviewed.evidence: Completion validation applies nonblank to each requested field; the temporary-copy smoke log records a whitespace-only summary being rejected.

acceptanceReviewed.criterion: Audit report checks reject blank nodeId, nested acceptanceReviewed strings, and realWorldValidation.evidence.
acceptanceReviewed.evidence: Audit validation applies nonblank to each requested field and keeps verificationEvidence booleans intact.

acceptanceReviewed.criterion: Linux validation evidence records the negative smoke test, qd report validation, full check, and whitespace diff check.
Existing qd reports pass the stricter check.
acceptanceReviewed.evidence: evidence/m4-qd-report-nonblank-content-contract/commands.log records `nix develop -c just qd-reports-check` passing with this node's reports included.

acceptanceReviewed.criterion: No macOS-specific validation is claimed or required.
acceptanceReviewed.evidence: realWorldValidation.required is false because this is repository qd report metadata validation only.

realWorldValidation.evidence: This is repository qd report metadata validation only; no runtime real-world validation is required.
